payload.message: Daily routine. Call yahoo_morning_briefing, then yahoo_auto_lineup. Execute any priority-1 action items (injured starters, pending trades). Report actions taken in 2-3 sentences.
Pre-lock check. Call yahoo_game_day_manager. If weather risks or late scratches affect your lineup, make adjustments. Report any changes.

New matchup week. Call yahoo_league_landscape for standings context, then yahoo_matchup_strategy for this week's opponent. Report: your opponent, category targets/concedes, top 2 recommended actions. Keep under 200 words.

Waiver deadline approaching. Call yahoo_waiver_deadline_prep. Review ranked claims with FAAB bids. If any recommendation shows strong net z-score improvement, submit the top waiver claim. Report recommendations and actions taken.
Midweek streaming check. Call yahoo_streaming to find two-start pitchers and favorable matchups. If any streaming add improves counting stats, execute the top add. Report findings.
Weekend roster audit. Call yahoo_roster_health_check. Report any critical or warning issues found. If there are healthy players stuck on IL, flag them for activation.
End of week. Call yahoo_weekly_digest. Report the week's result, key performers, standings movement, and notable roster moves. Keep the narrative concise.
Monthly check-in. Call yahoo_season_checkpoint. Report: strategic assessment, category trajectory, trade recommendations, and playoff outlook. Highlight any categories trending the wrong direction.
